auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Better Stack API token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it from Better Stack > API tokens: https://betterstack.com/docs/errors/api/getting-api-token/.

actions.name: acknowledge_incident
actions.description: Acknowledge a Better Stack incident to stop further escalations.

acknowledged_by.description: User email or custom identifier acknowledging the incident.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for acknowledging a Better Stack incident.

id.description: Better Stack incident identifier.

type.description: Resource type returned by Better Stack, usually incident.

name.description: Incident name returned by Better Stack.

anyOf.description: Affected URL when present.
HTTP method of the affected check when present.
String identifier returned by Better Stack.
Numeric identifier returned by Better Stack.
String or numeric Better Stack identifier.
Timestamp when the incident was acknowledged.
Actor that acknowledged the incident.
Timestamp when the incident was resolved.
Actor that resolved the incident.

status.description: Incident status reported by Better Stack.

anyOf.description: Captured response content when Better Stack includes it.
Serialized response options returned by Better Stack.
Monitoring regions attached to the incident.
Response URL captured for the incident, when present.
Screenshot URL captured for the incident, when present.
Origin URL returned by Better Stack, when present.
String identifier returned by Better Stack.
Numeric identifier returned by Better Stack.
String or numeric Better Stack identifier.

call.description: Whether calls are enabled for this incident.

sms.description: Whether SMS notifications are enabled for this incident.

email.description: Whether email notifications are enabled for this incident.

push.description: Whether push notifications are enabled for this incident.

critical_alert.description: Whether critical push notifications are enabled for this incident.

items.description: Slack channel name linked to the incident.

slack_channels.description: Slack channels attached to the incident.

value.description: String value used when the metadata entry type is String.

actions.name: create_incident
actions.description: Create a Better Stack incident and alert the current on-call responder.

team_name.description: Team name used when a global Better Stack API token needs explicit team scoping.

requester_email.description: Email address of the requester that opened the incident.

call.description: Whether Better Stack should call the current on-call responder.

sms.description: Whether Better Stack should send an SMS to the on-call responder.

email.description: Whether Better Stack should send an email to the on-call responder.

critical_alert.description: Whether Better Stack should send a critical push notification.

team_wait.description: Seconds to wait before escalating to the whole team.

actions.name: escalate_incident
actions.description: Escalate a Better Stack incident to a user, team, schedule, policy, or organization.

escalation_type.description: Escalation target type accepted by Better Stack.

user_email.description: User email to escalate the incident to.

user_id.description: User ID to escalate the incident to.

team_name.description: Team name to escalate the incident to.

team_id.description: Team ID to escalate the incident to.

schedule_id.description: On-call schedule ID to escalate the incident to.

policy_id.description: Escalation policy ID to escalate the incident to.

call.description: Whether the escalation should trigger phone calls.

sms.description: Whether the escalation should trigger SMS notifications.

email.description: Whether the escalation should trigger email notifications.

push.description: Whether the escalation should trigger push notifications.

critical_alert.description: Whether the escalation should trigger critical push notifications.

actions.name: list_incident_comments
actions.description: List all comments attached to a Better Stack incident.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing Better Stack incident comments.

id.description: Incident comment identifier.

type.description: Resource type returned by Better Stack, usually incident_comment.

id.description: Numeric incident comment identifier.

user_id.description: Author user ID when Better Stack returns it.

user_email.description: Author email when Better Stack returns it.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the comment was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the comment was last updated.

comments.description: Comments returned for the Better Stack incident.

outputSchema.description: Incident comments returned by Better Stack.

actions.name: list_incidents
actions.description: List Better Stack incidents with optional date and status filters.

team_name.description: Team name used when a global Better Stack API token needs explicit team scoping.

from.description: Only return incidents on or after this date.

to.description: Only return incidents on or before this date.

monitor_id.description: Only return incidents for this monitor ID.

heartbeat_id.description: Only return incidents for this heartbeat ID.

resolved.description: Whether to return resolved incidents only or unresolved incidents only.

acknowledged.description: Whether to return acknowledged incidents only or unacknowledged incidents only.

per_page.description: Number of incidents to return per page. Better Stack incident lists allow up to 50.

inputSchema.description: Filters and pagination parameters for listing Better Stack incidents.

owner_id.description: Only return metadata records for this owner ID.
